details.description: Pump-17 is exhibiting critical failure indicators, including a 69.23% increase in vibration, 40 detected anomalies, and active corrosion on the outlet flange. Immediate inspection and repairs are required to prevent catastrophic failure and potential operational downtime. Seal and bearing replacement are recommended.

details.message: Pump-17 is at imminent risk of failure with a 95% probability within 24-48 hours. Critical issues include increased vibration, seal and bearing degradation, and active corrosion on the outlet flange. Immediate action is required.

details.description: Pump-17 is at a high risk of failure with a 95% probability of bearing failure. Immediate action is required to replace the damaged bearing and prevent catastrophic damage.

details.message: Pump-17 is at a high risk of failure with a 95% probability of bearing failure. Immediate action is required to replace the damaged bearing and prevent catastrophic damage.

details.description: Critical corrosion and localized erosion affecting 20-25% of the surface area. Immediate risk of rupture or leakage under pressure. Urgent inspection and repair required to prevent catastrophic failure.

details.message: Critical corrosion and localized erosion detected on Pump-17. Immediate risk of rupture or leakage under pressure. Urgent inspection and repair required to prevent catastrophic failure.
